title: Kryll
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=New Republic |image=[[File:Kryll.jpg]] |name=Kryll |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]''[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' *[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] **[[Atrivis Sector Force]] *[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]''[[The Last Command]]'' |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|You're behind the times. Generis fell three days ago.''"
"''I hadn't heard. How bad was it?''"
"''Bad enough. We lost the whole comm center, more or less intact, and most of the sector fleet supply depots. On the plus side, we didn't leave them any ships they could use. And we were able to make enough trouble on our way out to let General Kryll sneak Travia Chan and her people out from under the Imperials' collective snout.|Pash Cracken and Wedge Antilles|}} [[General/Legends|General]] '''Kryll''' was an [[Officer/Legends|officer]] who served with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and later the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|General Kryll figures Thrawn must be picking his best people for his cloning templates.|Pash Cracken|}} Kryll was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] who served in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]. While engaged in a military campaign, he heard news of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star's]] [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destruction]] of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]. Kryll promptly defected, taking command of battered Alliance forces and assisting in the effort to created the [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]]. He was then assigned to the [[Atrivis Sector Force]], where he commanded the Alliance's [[Outer Rim Communications Center]] located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Generis/Legends|Generis]]. When Generis was [[Fall of Generis|attacked]] by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], Kryll's forces were quickly overwhelmed. However, he and [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Pash Cracken]] were able to arrange the escape of [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]] Commander-in-Chief [[Travia Chan/Legends|Travia Chan]], along with her staff. ==Personality and traits== Because of Kryll's former Imperial service, the general kept a stern bearing and enforced proper military discipline. However, when Kryll was off-duty he loved to sing old [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]]' songs off-key in the base's [[Tapcafe/Legends|tapcafe]]. He would often joke that he did not leave the Empire because of the destruction of Alderaan, rather instead it was because the rest of the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Officer Corps]] didn't sufficiently appreciate his "fine tenor voice." ==Skills and abilities== Kryll was trained in the use of [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] and blaster [[Artillery/Legends|artillery]], as well as [[Melee weapon/Legends|melee combat]]. He was knowledgeable about [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Species/Legends|species]], cultures, languages, and [[Star system/Legends|star systems]], and had a in-depth knowledge of [[Bureaucrat/Legends|bureaucratic]] procedure, especially in relation to the Outer Rim Communications Center. Kryll was an effective commander, with a keen grasp of [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] tactics, along with the ability to [[Pilot/Legends|fly]] [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] and [[Astrogation/Legends|pilot]] them through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. He was a keen [[Gambler/Legends|gambler]], and was able to repair and program [[Computer/Legends|computers]] and bypass security equipment.[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook'', Second Edition]] ==Equipment== Kryll was armed with a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]], and carried a [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] and [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The Last Command]]'' {{Ab|The Last Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]'' {{1stm}} *[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook'', Second Edition]] *{{FactFile|24|DEA 3-6|The Destruction of Alderaan}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Kryll }} [[Category:Alliance admirals and generals]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Imperial Army officers of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:New Republic Defense Force admirals and generals]]
